channel.title: Market Rebellion
channel.description: Daily options trading insights from Jon and Pete Najarian and the team at Market Rebellion. We share our take on the day’s stock market as viewed through unusual options activity and technical analysis.

item.description:
Here at Market Rebellion, we're on a mission to empower retail traders with the tools they need to succeed.
Discover how Market Rebellion uses the power of unusual option activity to follow the “smart money” and learn how you can conquer any market like a pro. Check out our Insider’s Guide to Trading UOA: https://marketrebellion.com/najarian-unusual-option-activity/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=marketrebellion
Ready to start trading? Try Unusual Option Activity Essential. Learn how you can follow the smart money with a fresh UOA trade idea each week - including technical levels so that you know where to enter and exit: https://marketrebellion.com/uoa-webinar-1/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=marketrebellion
Want more free market intel? Check out Market Rebellion’s Rebel Hub for the biggest stories on market-moving events, how-to trading guides, and the latest in Unusual Option Activity from Jon and Pete Najarian: https://marketrebellion.com/news/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=marketrebellion
—----------------- Market Rebellion —---------------
Interested in personal coaching? Call: 1 (888) 982-8342
More Information: http://www.marketrebellion.com
Follow Market Rebellion Twitter: https://twitter.com/MarketRebels​​ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marketrebels LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/marketrebellion/ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NajarianBrothers

item.description:
Pete Najarian explains why he coined the phrase “Discipline Dictates Action” and how it should start the moment you decide to enter every options trade.
